name: claude-router
description: Route host-agent work through the local Claude CLI with policy-backed modes, job tracking, and result handling.

interface.longDescription: Claude Router lets host agents invoke the local Claude CLI through explicit modes for analysis, planning, execution, review, adversarial review, setup, model discovery, background jobs, status, results, and cancellation.
defaultPrompt: Use Claude to plan this change
Ask Claude to review my diff
Run a Claude analysis job in the background
